Missing (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $32,502,025Details
International Box Office $14,035,188
Worldwide Box Office $46,537,213
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $742,760
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $639,492
Total $1,382,252
Further financial details...

Synopsis

When her mother disappears while on vacation in Colombia with her new boyfriend, June’s search for answers is hindered by international red tape. Stuck thousands of miles away in Los Angeles, June creatively uses all the latest technology at her fingertips to try and find her before it’s too late. But as she digs deeper, her digital sleuthing raises more questions than answers… and when June unravels secrets about her mom, she discovers that she never really knew her at all.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$9,154,695 (28.2% of total gross)
Legs:3.55 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:69.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$7,000,000 (worldwide box office is 6.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,025 opening theaters/3,025 max. theaters, 4.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $35,532,383

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 20th, 2023 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: February 22nd, 2023 (Wide), released as Missing: Disparition inquiétante (France)
February 22nd, 2023 (Wide) (South Korea)
February 23rd, 2023 (Wide) (Australia)
February 23rd, 2023 (Limited), released as Desaparecida (Portugal)
February 23rd, 2023 (Limited) (Netherlands)
Video Release: March 7th, 2023 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some strong violence, language, teen drinking, and thematic material.
(Rating bulletin 2734 (cert #53818), 6/1/2022)
Running Time: 111 minutes
Franchise: Searching
Filming location (city or town): Los Angeles, CA
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (state or county): California, United States
Geographical setting: Colombia, Los Angeles
Plot point: Missing Person, Tourists In Trouble
Subgenre: Psychological Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Stage 6 Films, Screen Gems, Bazelevs Company, Search Party
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

When her mother disappears while on vacation in Colombia with her new boyfriend, June’s search for answers is hindered by international red tape. Stuck thousands of miles away in Los Angeles, June creatively uses all the latest technology at her fingertips to try and find her before it’s too late. But as she digs deeper, her digital sleuthing raises more questions than answers… and when June unravels secrets about her mom, she discovers that she never really knew her at all.
